title: Department Manager Vacancy at The Coffee Bean India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at The Coffee Bean India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India:
The Coffee Bean India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India!
